agent_reply: - Falls back to `webcrypto-liner.min.js` via known liner globals.
- Lazy-loads `webcrypto-liner.min.js` if it was not already loaded.
- Keeps `getRandomValues` separate, so browsers with random support but no `subtle` still work for `/get_info`.
I also regenerated [inc/web_assets.h](D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/inc/web_assets.h) so the firmware asset matches the updated frontend.
Small note: [webcrypto-liner.min.js](D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/html/webcrypto-liner.min.js) is still untracked in git right now, so remember to add it when you commit this.
